articles.title: India-UK CETA kicks in: Kolkata ships first jewellery exports to Britain with zero import duty
articles.summary: The flag-off was part of a simultaneous nationwide launch held in Delhi, Mumbai, Surat, Jaipur, and Chennai

articles.title: From ₹15,000 to ₹36,000: She never became a teacher—but what happened next transformed her life
articles.summary: "From a ₹15,000 school-library salary to ₹36,000 a month through household gig apps, Kiran says technology gave her the choice and the chance to rewrite her future."

articles.title: China's GDP growth slows to its lowest since 2022. Q2 growth slips to 4.3%
articles.summary: The slowdown reflects the continued drag from China's prolonged property market downturn, weak consumer confidence, and rising external risks

articles.title: Investment 101: How to rebalance your portfolio for FY27 - top mistakes to avoid
articles.summary: When building an investment portfolio, investors decide on an asset allocation. Let’s say, a portfolio comprising 70% equity and 30% debt investments.

articles.title: HDB Financial Services Q1FY26 net profit up 38% at Rs 785 crore
Oil, LNG, fertilisers and maybe diamonds: What is at risk from Iran’s wider blockade threat
articles.summary: Iran has warned of wider trade disruptions beyond the Strait of Hormuz. This threat could impact crucial energy and other export flows from the region. The Strait of Hormuz is a vital chokepoint for global oil and gas shipments.

articles.title: Two Varanasi highway projects worth Rs 25,446 crore approved - how they will affect commuters
articles.summary: The Cabinet Committee on Economic Affairs has greenlighted an ambitious infrastructure project in Varanasi, featuring a remarkable Rs 10,998.32 crore investment. The initiative is set to create a 43.2-km elevated corridor, referred to as the Varuna Expressway.

articles.title: Started with just ₹10,000, now employs 60: How government schemes are changing lives in Meerut
articles.summary: From a Rs 10,000 momos stall to a factory and a Rs 32 lakh handicraft turnover, Meerut’s small loans are building sustainable livelihoods and wider economic growth.

articles.title: Good news for travellers! Emirates introduces EMI option for Indian flyers
articles.summary: Emirates’ new EMI option lets Indians book now and pay over time — making long‑planned trips and premium upgrades affordable.

articles.title: BPCL, Akasa Air join hands to boost Sustainable Aviation Fuel adoption in India
articles.summary: BPCL and Akasa Air have signed an MoU to develop supply and offtake pathways for sustainable aviation fuel in India. The partnership is aimed at improving SAF readiness, supporting policy engagement and advancing aviation decarbonisation.

articles.title: Cabinet approves Semicon 2.0 with budget outlay of ₹1.27 lakh crore
articles.summary: The government said Semicon 2.0 would support economic growth across sectors, strengthen national security through resilient supply chains and help establish technological leadership in critical industries.

articles.title: Cabinet approves National Investment Policy for Urea-2026 to boost domestic production
articles.summary: The Union Cabinet has cleared a new investment policy aimed at expanding India's domestic urea manufacturing capacity and reducing reliance on imports.

articles.title: Semicon 2.0, Varanasi projects, rail upgrades & more: 7 big decisions cleared by Cabinet
articles.summary: The Union Cabinet approved seven significant decisions on Wednesday. These approvals covered infrastructure development and semiconductor manufacturing initiatives. Railway network upgradation and mobile phone manufacturing schemes were also sanctioned.

articles.title: Blue, red or white — Indian Railways' train colours are actually telling you something important
articles.summary: Blue ICF coaches mean express trains, red LHB means safer and faster, white Vande Bharat means premium travel. Here's what Indian train colours actually tell you about your journey.

articles.title: Rolls-Royce and Range Rover got cheaper by up to ₹3 crore in India — here's why
articles.summary: India-UK FTA slashes customs duty on British luxury cars from 110% to 30% from July 15 — saving buyers ₹1–3 crore on Rolls-Royce, Range Rover, Aston Martin and McLaren models.

articles.title: IRCTC's new website is live: Faster Tatkal, seat choice and a fare calendar — here's what changed
articles.summary: IRCTC's new website launched July 15 with 1.5 lakh bookings per minute, fare calendar, seat preference, multi-language support and a cleaner interface for faster Tatkal booking.

articles.title: India fuel exports near 10-month high as war-driven shortages lift margins
articles.summary: India's oil-product exports are set to reach their highest level since September in July as refiners raise shipments during US-Iran war

articles.title: A Bengaluru-Delhi flight changed this CEO's life. Here's what a DRDO scientist told him
articles.summary: Chakrabarti said that despite spending more than two decades in the corporate world, no one had ever asked him that question so directly.

articles.title: Before you buy a bike, check this seat height list — it could change your decision entirely
articles.summary: From Bajaj Avenger's 737mm to Royal Enfield Hunter's 790mm, here are 6 bikes under ₹1.85 lakh with the lowest seat heights in India — perfect for short riders in 2026.

articles.title: Maruti Brezza facelift bookings open now at ₹11,000 — new turbo engine expected on July 23
articles.summary: Maruti Suzuki Brezza facelift bookings are open at ₹11,000 with prices announced July 23. Expect a new turbo engine, refreshed design, digital cluster and updated infotainment system.

articles.title: Aditya Birla Group acquires Shell’s India renewable energy arm, Sprng Energy
articles.summary: Kumar Mangalam Birla, Chairman, Aditya Birla Group, said the deal brings together two highly complementary platforms and marks an important milestone in ABRen's evolution.

articles.title: China's economic growth slows to weakest pace in three years despite export boom
articles.summary: China's economic growth slowed in the second quarter, impacted by weak domestic demand. Strong exports, particularly in electric vehicles and AI, provided some support. Consumer spending and investment remain subdued amid property market uncertainty.

articles.title: Sensex jumps over 500 points, Nifty above 24,200: Top reasons driving stock market rally
articles.summary: Dalal Street experienced a strong rebound on Wednesday, reversing previous session losses. Improving tech sentiments and a firmer rupee boosted investor confidence significantly. Geopolitical developments and global cues also supported the market's upward movement.

articles.title: Gold price prediction today: Where are gold & silver headed? Check July 15, 2026 outlook
articles.summary: Gold price prediction today: Gold prices are likely to see a constructive outlook in the near-term, while silver is supported for the long-term, says Vedika Narvekar, Research Analyst - Commodities & Currencies, Anand Rathi Shares and Stock Brokers.

articles.title: India a 'huge growth opportunity': UK-India investment pact can boost FDI, says former FTA negotiator
articles.summary: India presents significant global investment opportunities, attracting companies with its long-term growth potential. A proposed Bilateral Investment Treaty between India and the UK could boost investor confidence.

articles.title: Worse fall than 1987, $69 billion wipeout as IBM ‘falters’: Why stock price crashed 25% - analysts call it ‘ugly moment’
articles.summary: ​​Shares of IBM plunged 25% on Tuesday, with the company seeing a steeper one-day decline than it experienced during the 1987 "Black Monday" market crash. The weakness also spread to other software stocks.

articles.title: Stock market today: BSE Sensex jumps 550 points, NSE Nifty50 crosses 24,200
Gold Silver Rate Today Live Updates: Gold rallies over 2% to $4,063 as weak US data boosts investor sentiments
IBM shares tank 26% after initial results disappoint
articles.summary: International Business Machines reported disappointing preliminary results on Tuesday. This news caused significant drops in software and IT services company shares. Investors are now concerned about a capital spending pivot impacting the entire industry.

articles.title: Air transport down 14% in April: ISP data
articles.summary: Air transport output contracted nearly fourteen percent in April, reflecting high fuel costs. Railways also saw a slight decline in output during the same month. Fourteen of nineteen services sub-sectors registered double-digit growth, showing overall resilience.

articles.title: Oil price today: Crude tops $85 a barrel as US restores Strait of Hormuz blockade
articles.summary: Oil prices surged beyond eighty-five dollars per barrel on Wednesday. This occurred after the United States reinstated a naval blockade on Iran. Fighting between Washington and Tehran escalated, raising concerns over crude supplies.

articles.title: Singapore court denies stay on Byju's jail term
articles.summary: Singapore's high court denied Byju Raveendran's request to suspend his contempt sentence. The court lifted temporary protection for the Byju's founder while his appeal is pending. His legal team clarified the hearing focused only on the stay application.

articles.title: NCLT okays record no. of cases, flags manpower shortage
articles.summary: The National Company Law Tribunal approved a record 78 resolution plans in April-June. This period saw approvals valued at Rs 5,518 crore, reaching nearly Rs 4.8 lakh crore total. The tribunal faces significant institutional capacity constraints and member vacancies.

articles.title: Top stocks to buy today: Stock recommendations for July 15, 2026 - check list
articles.summary: Stock market recommendations: Route Mobile, Tata Power, and Dr. Reddy's Laboratories - these are the top stocks to buy picked by Mehul Kothari, DVP - Technical Research at Anand Rathi Shares for July 15, 2026.

articles.title: Quote of the Day by Steve Jobs: ‘Older people sit down and ask...’
articles.summary: Steve Jobs (1955-2011) was an American entrepreneur, inventor, and business magnate best known as the co-founder of Apple. Jobs played a key role in revolutionising personal computing, smartphones, digital music, and animation.

articles.title: Wholesale inflation touches 27-month high of 9.9% in June
articles.summary: Wholesale inflation reached a 27-month high of 9.9 percent in June. This surge was driven by rising food prices and energy costs. Food prices accelerated to 5.5 percent while mineral prices rose significantly.

articles.title: With 73% rise, Adani Properties top realty gainer
articles.summary: Adani Properties saw significant wealth surge, moving to fourth position on the property list. DLF retained its top valuation despite a notable decline in its overall worth. Lodha Developers and Indian Hotels Company also experienced valuation decreases this year.

articles.title: 'Hello, this is Divya': How one WhatsApp message allegedly cost a 70-year-old Gwalior CA ₹21 crore
articles.summary: On December 25, 2025, Vijayvargiya allegedly transferred ₹10,000 four times through UPI. A few days later, around ₹1 lakh was transferred through a friend's UPI account.

articles.title: UK-India FTA goes live today: From whisky to premium cars, what gets cheaper and which Indian sectors gain
articles.summary: The FTA gives 99% of Indian exports duty-free access to the UK, while India has selectively reduced tariffs on British goods over a phased period. New Delhi has, however, protected sensitive domestic sectors

articles.title: RBI officials meet top bankers. Here's key issues that were discussed
articles.summary: RBI Governor Sanjay Malhotra urged banks to leverage advanced technologies, including AI, to improve operational efficiency and enhance customer experience, while also ensuring robust cybersecurity,
